race.comment: DEALER SING (4) debuts for the premier stable and has looked the goods at the jumpouts. Exits from the inside barrier with John Allen aboard, and has the blinkers on signalling intent. Kicking off over 607m won't be a bother, and he finds a winnable assignment. MEKA VIBE (2) presents fourth-up off promising efforts at Echuca over 1400m, starting a $2.7 favourite the latest, beaten a nose. Led and just missed at Wodonga the last time he tackled this distance range, and Rawiller will give him every chance to go one better. BORN SURVIVOR (1) missed the frame at Yarra Valley (vet cleared), but before that had been in the money on two consecutive occasions, including a near miss over this trip at Cranbourne. Blinkers going on is a positive sign from the stable, and he draws inside today. Has each-way claims. CHARLECOTE MILL (8) peaks and had excuses last time at Geelong in stronger. Missed by 2L at Ararat prior, well supported, and that effort would have him in the mix.
